steps.title: Identify the key time signal
steps.content: The adverb “Currently” at the start of the second sentence establishes that we are describing the frog's range as it exists in the present.

steps.title: Apply the present-tense rule
steps.content: 'Includes' (C) is simple present tense, which directly matches the present-time signal of “Currently”. The other three choices use past perfect, future perfect, and simple past — all incompatible with describing something in the present. That matches choice C — C is correct.
